description: Chrome cookies parser reads Cookies SQLite and emits BrowserEvent per cookie
steps: Query cookies table: host_key, name, path, creation_utc, expires_utc, is_secure, is_httponly, samesite
Convert creation_utc with webkit_to_unix_ns() from crate::history
Attrs: host, name, path, is_secure (bool), is_httponly (bool), samesite (i32), expires_utc (i64), encrypted_value = 'ENCRYPTED'
Test: parse_empty_cookies_returns_empty — empty table yields empty vec
Test: zero_creation_utc_is_skipped — row with creation_utc=0 produces no events
